title: Auto-highlight export + DB3 Operator (Surveyed By)
description:
DB3 Surveyed By now resolves from WinCan Operator FK (INS_Operator_REF / OP_Key → WCMETA.OPERATOR.OP_PK) at import time, so auto-highlight labels and PDF export show the operator name—not a numeric key.

Highlights with Structure Nodes download adds checkboxes: Include Inspection direction and Include Surveyed By. Checked options bake arrows and inspector labels onto the PDF with the same rx/ry mapping as highlight lines.

Auto-highlight positioning uses viewer page-local rx/ry (same path as manual highlights). Re-running auto-highlight replaces prior DB3 lines instead of stacking duplicates.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg56).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: DB3: resolve Operator name from INS_Operator_REF via OPERATOR table.
Download: optional inspection-direction arrow + Surveyed By on structure-nodes export.
Auto-highlight: viewer-local coords; replace prior auto lines on re-run.
Manual + auto highlights share download dedupe and coord pipeline.
